calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen L. Paullada, Esq., Appearing for Defendant/Appellant Aspen Holdings LLC
John Emrani, Managing Member of Aspen Holdings LLC
Daniel Balsam, Plaintiff/Respondent In Pro Per

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Daniel Balsam, Plaintiff/Respondent, testifies on his behalf. The following exhibit is identified:
Exhibit 1-A - Balsam's List of Email Addresses

Stephen L. Paullada, Esq. & John Emrani, Managing Member of Aspen Holdings LLC, testifies on behalf of Aspen Holdings LLc, Defendant/Appelant. The following exhibits are identified:
Exhibit H - Aspen Holding Fictitious Business Name Statement For FundCapital America and FastFundUSA.
Exhibit I - California Dept. of Corporations Licenses
Exhibit J - Domain Name Registrys For DanBalsam.com and Danmatesspam.com
Exhibit K - Registration of Balsam at Morelaw.com

All identified exhibits by Plaintiff/Respondent & Defendant/Appellant are admitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Ellen Chaitin, Clerk Maria Pena, Not Reported (606).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-19-12 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Continued To Jan-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Jan-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
